positive: Minimalist forest gnome silhouette with a basket of glowing mystical berries, centered, perfect for a t-shirt print. The style should be clean, vector-graphic illustration with solid black ink against a creamy, off-white background. High contrast, clean lines, strong silhouette definition. Incorporate subtle nature elements like stylized mushrooms and ferns, maintaining a whimsical yet geometric aesthetic. The overall composition must be isolated and contained, emphasizing graphic impact and print readiness. Flat color blocking, suitable for single-color screen printing.
